Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing for accounts in the CryptoPro NGate control panel

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Password bruteforcing attempts for account {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} in the CryptoPro NGate control panel on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {count.subevents}.

Successful password bruteforcing for account {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} in the CryptoPro NGate control panel on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {count.subevents}.
